notable_excerpts: Our first key focus is to take the cell and module line to 10 GW.
Our business plan does not significantly depend upon the EBITDA of the manufacturing component of ANIL. It is finally a green hydrogen business.
The Greenfield Ganga Expressway project in our roads business is now 85% complete and is set to be completed in the second half of this year.
We are in the process of working out the relevant internal disclosures, etc., to actually have the airport team join the next call post-half-yearly results.
We are comfortable that at least the airport business will be technically ready, subject to board approvals.
We are in the process of working out the relevant internal disclosures, etc., to actually have the airport team join the next call post-half-yearly results.

chain_of_thought: The earnings call highlighted Adani's focus on expanding renewable energy capabilities, particularly in solar and green hydrogen. Social aspects were touched upon with community projects like the Ganga Expressway and employee engagement in airport operations. Governance was addressed through discussions on board approvals and transparency in future disclosures.
strengths: Strong focus on renewable energy expansion
weaknesses: Limited specific details on social initiatives
red_flags: Potential impact of US tariffs on solar business
